Interface IUNResultType3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that specify the properties of a utility network trace result type 3.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("9AE7A0AB-3435-48CF-8E11-B5D8282E7D18")]
public interface IUNResultType3 : IUNResultType2, IUNResultType

Properties

DiagramTemplateName 

string DiagramTemplateName { get; set; }

Property Value

string

IncludeDomainDescriptions 

bool IncludeDomainDescriptions { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

IncludeFlowDirections

Returns include flow directions.

bool IncludeFlowDirections { get; set; }

Property Value

bool
